data.dialogueLine: Clancy. Do you know why this happened?
Why your most treasured person was taken from this mortal plane?
You and Matilda Waltzing selfishly collaborated, worked against your fellow human beings…
...with the arrogant view that, to each of you, the other person was that much more important than the others around you.
Through direct experience, you will see the truth.
This activity and its outcome have built towards seeing that truth, Clancy.
The most important thing… is every life in the world around us.
